Bus Timings

Bus Stop at ASCANA 3 Building, Al Warqa’a, Dubai

March 2, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Warqa’a, ASCANA 3 Building Bus Stop is a key transit point in the vibrant Al Warqa area of Dubai. Strategically positioned, it offers convenient access to local amenities, shopping centers, and dining options, making it an essential stop for both daily commuters and visitors. This bus stop serves as a gateway to various destinations within Dubai, connecting passengers to essential services and nearby attractions.

Address

Al Warqa Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google directions here.

Situated in the bustling Al Warqa area, the Al Warqa’a, ASCANA 3 Building Bus Stop is a crucial part of Dubai’s transit network. Well-connected by several bus routes, it provides convenient access to nearby shopping centers, healthcare facilities, and dining options, making it a key hub for both locals and visitors.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Al Warqa’a, ASCANA 3 Building Bus Stop is serviced by two main bus routes, F10 and F61, which operate throughout the day and night. The timings are as follows:

Bus Route Bus Station Timings
F10 Al Warqa 8:07 PM
F10 Al Warqa 8:35 PM
F61 Al Warqa 8:48 PM
F10 Al Warqa 9:36 PM
F61 Al Warqa 9:48 PM
F10 Al Warqa 10:34 PM
F61 Al Warqa 10:48 PM
F10 Al Warqa 11:34 PM
F61 Al Warqa 11:39 PM
F61 Al Warqa 12:33 AM
F10 Al Warqa 12:49 AM
F61 Al Rashidiya MS 5:19 AM
F10 Al Warqa 6:00 AM
F61 Al Warqa 6:11 AM
F10 Al Warqa 6:30 AM
F61 Al Warqa 6:39 AM
F10 Al Warqa 7:03 AM
F61 Al Warqa 7:19 AM
F10 Al Warqa 7:41 AM
F61 Al Warqa 7:53 AM
F10 Al Warqa 8:09 AM
F61 Al Warqa 8:23 AM
F10 Al Warqa 8:40 AM
F61 Al Warqa 8:49 AM
F10 Al Warqa 9:03 AM

Bus Route Details

The Al Warqa’a, ASCANA 3 Building Bus Stop is served by two key bus routes:

  • F10 Route: This route connects the bus stop to Dubai Safari Park and Al Warqa’a J. Buses operate approximately every 30 minutes, with first departures as early as 05:56 AM and continuing until the last service at 01:01 AM. This route provides frequent and reliable options for exploring local attractions and commuting within the Al Warqa area.

  • F61 Route: Linking Al Warqa’a with Rashidiya Bus Station Parking, this route starts running at 04:32 AM and offers consistent service throughout the day with buses departing at regular intervals. The last bus departs at 00:50 AM.

Nearby Destinations

The bus stop’s location provides easy access to various amenities, making it a central point for exploring Al Warqa. Notable nearby destinations include:

Cafeterias

  • OVO Cafeteria: Known for its diverse menu and casual atmosphere.
  • Kababi Cafeteria: Offers a range of Middle Eastern dishes.
  • Um Ali Cafeteria: A popular spot for traditional snacks and meals.
  • Pizza Hut: For a quick and familiar dining option.

Landmarks

  • Al Dywan Building: A prominent building in the area.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Mir 4 Building: A notable residential structure.
  • Reshad: A well-known local landmark.
  • D2 Building: A key building in the vicinity.
  • Al Telal 9: An important landmark in the Al Warqa area.

Shopping Centers

  • Qaser Al Kabayel Shopping Mall: Features various shops and dining options.

  • Magic Lain Shopping Mall: A local mall with a variety of stores.
  • Q1 Mall, Al Warqa: Offers diverse shopping and entertainment.
  • Dakakeen by Aswaaq Shopping Mall: A shopping center with a range of retail outlets.
  • Celebrity Store Shopping Mall: Provides an extensive selection of stores and amenities.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Reliance Healthcare: Offers a wide range of medical services.

  • 97 Healthcare: Provides comprehensive healthcare services.
  • Moosa Healthcare: Known for quality medical care.

Pharmacies

  • Aster Pharmacy 120: A well-stocked pharmacy with a wide selection of products.

  • Life Pharmacy: Offers essential medications and health supplies.
  • Life Pharmacy Al Warqa 2: Provides pharmaceutical products and services.
  • Medilux Pharmacy: Known for its extensive range of health-related products.
  • Docib Healthcare Pharmacy: A reliable source for healthcare needs.

Accommodation

  • Xclusive Casa Hotel Apartments: Offers comfortable lodging options close to the bus stop.

Nearby stops

  1. Al Warqaa, Ascana 3 Building 2 (50m): F10

  2. Al Warqaa, La Lune Building 2 (294m): F10

  3. Al Warqaa, La Lune Building 1 (308m): F10, F61

  4. Al Warqaa, Charity Tower 2 (360m): F10

  5. Al Warqaa, Charity Tower 1 (374m): F10, F61

The Al Warqa’a, ASCANA 3 Building Bus Stop is more than just a transit point; it is a vital hub located at the heart of a bustling community. With its strategic location, accessibility features, and proximity to essential services, it provides a convenient and comfortable way to navigate the city. Whether you’re commuting for work, heading out for shopping, or exploring the local area, this bus stop is a key part of your journey in Dubai.
